evidence_label: current literature refresh for private-send readiness gate, not treatment advice
source: NCBI PubMed ESearch and ESummary plus direct page checks
pubmed_query: (thalassemia OR beta-thalassemia) AND (HBG OR HbF OR erythroid OR hemolysis OR autophagy OR pyruvate kinase OR metabolism OR CD34 OR HUDEP2) AND 2026[pdat]

records.role: current pyruvate-kinase activation review; optional endpoint context only
records.title: Pyruvate Kinase Activation in the Management of Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Disease.

records.role: gamma-globin regulation context; keeps HBG and HbF endpoints explicit
records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

records.role: erythroid metabolism review; supports ATP and glycolysis as optional addenda
records.title: Understanding and targeting erythroid cell metabolism.

records.role: HBG promoter editing benchmark; not a preclinical quote action route
records.title: In vivo genome editing of human haematopoietic stem cells for treatment of blood disorders using mRNA delivery.

direct_publisher_checks.role: Guangxi ex vivo pyruvate-kinase activator source; keeps metabolism readouts visible but does not change send readiness
direct_publisher_checks.title: SNH-119014, a novel pyruvate kinase activator, enhances ATP production and reduces oxidative stress in erythroid cells from patients with beta-thalassemia major

decision_use: No June 17 source changes the operational blocker. A private-send workflow remains blocked until scoped approval, recipient qualification, packet pass, private sender-recipient handling, and response capture all exist.
